item.title: Proof that the Foo Fighters were physical objects
item.description:
Copers on Skepticpedia said this about Foo Fighters:

“Any type of electrical discharge from the wings of airplanes (see St. Elmo’s Fire) has been suggested as an explanation, since it has been known to appear at the wingtips of aircraft.”

Now look at this declassified document from the May 8th published documents.

It is clearly talking about an “aluminum colored cylinder shaped object”

Does that look like an electrical discharge like the St. Elmo’s fire to you?

item.title: UFOs tilting sideways, as mentioned by Bob Lazar and as seen in 'Gimball'
item.description:
Mention of UFOs tilting sideways in the new declassified files.

As mentioned by Bob Lazar and as seen in “Gimball”

item.title: The Hollow Moon and the Primordials
item.description:
Prior Knowledge Required:
- Ancient Aliens Theory
- Hollow Moon Theory

The seismometer’s results from the Apollo missions were the first thing that made me question the nature of our Moon.

If it is indeed hollow, like many of us believers in the UFO phenomenon and in the Ancient Alien Theory think, then it is also artificial.

But I do not claim that it is in fact a spaceship. I never did.

item.title: Decrypting the Wow! Signal using the I-ching: an environmental warning from outer space
item.description:
Prior Knowledge Required:
- Wow! Signal
- Binary Code
- I-ching
- Ancient Aliens Theory
- Ariel School UFO Incident

Quoting the Ancient Aliens TV documentary:

“According to mythology, the I-Ching was created by Emperor Fu Xi after he was visited by an otherworldly being. It was said that one day he was on the Yellow River and a water dragon appeared to him, and that on the back of this water dragon was revealed to him the I-Ching. And therefore we can see this system as in some way having come from the stars, originally.”
